steps.title: Spot the addition of a second observation
steps.content: The passage presents two distinct things about the poem's response to the artwork: it explores temporality and identity, and it reflects on the relationship between poetry and other art forms. The second observation adds a new dimension to our understanding of the poem.

steps.title: Match the additive transition
steps.content: ”What's more” signals the introduction of a second observation that complements the first — the transition structure needed here. The other three signal different relationships that would break this additive logic. That matches choice C — C is correct.
